phonetic: 蕦n藞su藧t瑟d; 蕦n藞sju藧t瑟d
examples: He is unsuited to academic work.
He's totally unsuited to the job.
She was totally unsuited for the job.
Tax return data is unsuited for measuring income distribution for other reasons as well.
Many providers of alternative therapy say it is inherently unsuited to double-blind randomised trials.
